text:
(a) 112[***]
103 Substituted by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds)(Amendment)
Regulations, 2018, w.e.f. 01-06-2018. Prior to the substitution, it read as “The angel fund may launch schemes subject
to filing of a scheme memorandum at least ten working days prior to launch of the scheme with the Board:
heading: Section 4 of the Companies Act, 1956;”.
